# specfarm Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-28

## Active Technologies
- Bash, PowerShell, XML, Markdown (Grok/Gemini for inference) + Git, SpecKit (for task inference), standard Unix utilities (grep, sed, awk) (002-specfarm-phase-2)
- `.specfarm/rules.xml`, `.specfarm/config` (git-trackable), `.specfarm/justifications.log` (002-specfarm-phase-2)

- Bash / Shell (compatible with POSIX) + git, grep, awk, sed (001-specfarm-phase-1)

tests/
